title: Visual Poster AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vivid tropical advertising poster for a citrus soda bottle. Product Hero: One large transparent plastic bottle labeled "SODA", filled with bright golden-orange soda, with a yellow cap, condensation droplets, and readable label details. Flavor: Label and fruit visuals communicate aux agrumes d’été; fruit set: orange, lemon, grapefruit slices, and tiny mint leaves. Scene: Bottle stands on sunny aqua-blue pool tile with ice cubes, with blurred palm shadows and sparkling pool water behind it. Composition: Slightly right-of-center bottle angled left, glossy droplets, foreground fruit slices, clean poster hierarchy. Typography: Include headline "SUMMER POP" and fictional product label only. Style: Bright commercial summer beverage photography, high saturation, crisp product focus, refreshing splash energy. Restrictions: No real brand logos, no warped bottle, no unreadable label, no random text, no cluttered ad layout.
